findings.issue: Engine._proc_wrapper set to None before extension hooks ran
findings.fix: added _last_proc_wrapper preserved past the finally block

findings.issue: FailureAnalyzer hooked to wrapper that was always None
GitAutoCommitter could fire purely from a CLI flag
findings.fix: now requires both CLI flag AND cfg.git_auto_commit_enabled

findings.issue: HTTP dashboard had no auth and could bind to 0.0.0.0
findings.fix: Bearer token + loopback-only bind, both configurable

findings.issue: Plugins loaded from disk with no integrity check
findings.fix: PluginSignatureGuard refuses unsigned plugins by default

findings.issue: Logs and replays could leak API keys / OAuth tokens
findings.fix: redact_secrets() applied via _RedactingFormatter on all handlers

findings.issue: no dry-run path → first-time setup risked spending tokens
findings.fix: RunnerConfig.dry_run replaces claude with cmd /c echo no-op

findings.issue: no allowlist on file writes / deletes
Windows API calls executed unconditionally on POSIX
findings.fix: WindowsHelper checks os.name == 'nt' on every entry; preflight surfaces non-Windows clearly

findings.issue: self-prompt asked Claude to modify CLAUDE.md / DELIVERY-MANIFEST.md, contradicting the 'never modify' rule
findings.fix: normalize_prompt() rewrites those mentions to autonomous/session-log/* unless explicit opt-in
PreflightChecker validates python, claude, root, git, writability, single-instance, disk, platform, dangerous-mode

findings.issue: dead code: extra_claude_flags was unused in some paths
comments said 'never delete' but Section 36 added deletion
findings.fix: deletion now requires explicit --allow-conflict-deletion AND always tombstones (reversible) — comments aligned
